block_01: In 2017, during the “Crypto Boom”, Jamie Dimon, the CEO of JPMorgan Chase had famously promised that; any one of his employees caught trading Crypto Currency, would be fired. The reason, because that would mean, they are “stupid”.
block_02: Two years on, & the company is heavily invested in Blockchain Technology & does not seem to be slowing down. The investment giant is planning to expand an existing blockchain project to include settlement features, in order to further compete with upstarts such as TransferWise & Ripple.
block_03: Currently the platform already allows banks to quickly resolve compliance issues which ordinarily may have caused a delay in payments by weeks. However the Blockchain Project is now said to be expanded, with 220 Banks to also include payments.
block_04: We often fear what we do not understand. Is this u-turn an example of that? Is it an example of hypocrisy, or perhaps just how the “big boys do business”
block_05: Although Blockchain is not directly correlated with the use of Bitcoin; Crypto investors will be pleased to see the mass adoption of the technology which gave birth to the Crypto movement.
